name: cleats-python-launchpad
description: Run and debug the current or last Python file with minimal setup.
author: Tomas Bouda

commands.title: Cleats: Python Launchpad - Debug Current File
Cleats: Python Launchpad - Run Current File
Cleats: Python Launchpad - Debug Last File
Cleats: Python Launchpad - Run Last File
Cleats: Python Launchpad - Remove Managed Target Configurations

cleatsPythonLaunchpad.runCommandTemplate.description: Default script run command template used to initialize launch.json managed template entries. Supported placeholders: {script}, {workspaceFolder}, {fileDirname}, {fileBasename}, {testTarget}, {testFunction}, {pytestTarget}, {pytestFunction}.

cleatsPythonLaunchpad.pytestCommandTempl.description: Run command template used when Cleats detects a pytest file and pytest is the configured Python test framework. Supported placeholders: {script}, {workspaceFolder}, {fileDirname}, {fileBasename}, {testTarget}, {testFunction}, {pytestTarget}, {pytestFunction}.

cleatsPythonLaunchpad.unittestCommandTem.description: Run command template used when Cleats detects a test file and unittest is the configured Python test framework. Supported placeholders: {script}, {workspaceFolder}, {fileDirname}, {fileBasename}, {testTarget}, {testFunction}, {pytestTarget}, {pytestFunction}.

cleatsPythonLaunchpad.generatedLaunchNam.description: Prefix used for launch.json entries managed by Cleats: Python Launchpad.

cleatsPythonLaunchpad.launchWorkspaceFol.description: Optional workspace folder name or absolute folder path whose launch.json Cleats should manage in multi-root workspaces. Empty means use the Python file's own workspace folder.

cleatsPythonLaunchpad.runOpenNewTerminal.description: When enabled, run commands open a new terminal if another Cleats run is still active.

cleatsPythonLaunchpad.terminalReveal.description: Controls when the integrated terminal is revealed for run commands.

scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test
